    @pytest.mark.error
    @pytest.mark.parametrize(
        ("case_id", "content"),
        [
            (
                "bad_syntax",
                """\
                input a b
                output y
                y = AND(a, b
                """,
            ),
            (
                "literal_x",
                """\
                input a
                output y
                y = X
                """,
            ),
            (
                "brackets",
                """\
                input a[0]
                output y
                y = a
                """,
            ),
        ],
    )
    def test_check_parse_errors_have_location(
        entrypoint_argv: list[str],
        tmp_path: Path,
        case_id: str,
        content: str,

        path = write_circ(tmp_path, f"{case_id}.circ", content)
        result, payload = run_json_command(
            entrypoint_argv,
            ["check", str(path), "--json"],
        )
